project_type: Google Colab Python notebook script for AI video generation using LTX-2 model with ComfyUI nodes
build_system: Google Colab with pip installs and ComfyUI custom nodes. No Makefile or standard build system.
test_framework: No formal test framework. Validation is via AST syntax checking (python -m py_compile) and grep verification of expected patterns.
verification_instructions: 1. Run python -m py_compile LTX_PRO.py to verify syntax. 2. Run AST parse to confirm no syntax errors. 3. Verify key classes/functions exist via grep.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - this is a standalone Python script meant for Google Colab execution.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network mode - cannot pip install, cannot download models, cannot run Docker. Use AST/syntax validation only. The script depends on ComfyUI, torch, transformers, etc. which are NOT available in this sandbox. Code changes must be validated structurally (AST parse, grep checks) not functionally.
contribution_requirements: The script is a single monolithic .py file organized in numbered cells (Cell 0-11). All modifications must maintain cell structure, inline comments, and the @param annotations for Colab form fields. The script must remain syntactically valid Python.
key_patterns: 1. Global variables with @param annotations for Colab forms. 2. ComfyUI NODE_CLASS_MAPPINGS access pattern. 3. VRAMManager for GPU detection and optimization. 4. InlinePromptArchitect/InlineVisionDescribe as embedded fallbacks when ComfyUI nodes unavailable. 5. generate_pro() is the main two-pass generation function. 6. generate_extended_video()/generate_infinite_flow() for SVI-Pro style segment iteration. 7. run_storyboard() for multi-scene sequential generation. 8. blend_overlap_frames() for segment stitching. 9. PersistentLatentSeed + CharacterPromptAnchor for character consistency. 10. Content tier detection (explicit/sensual/neutral) for prompt expansion.
directory_structure: Single directory /projects/sandbox/ltx/ containing: LTX_PRO.py (main 7079-line script), LTX2EasyPromptLD.py (ComfyUI prompt expansion node, 1065 lines), LTX2VisionEasyPromptLD.py (ComfyUI vision description node, 190 lines), SVI-Pro-Workflow.json (ComfyUI workflow for Wan2.2 with SVI Pro), LD-I2V.json (LTX-2 I2V workflow)
